mods.name: Sodium
mods.reason: Core rendering engine replacement for modern Minecraft. NeoForge builds are available, so this remains the rendering foundation.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: Lithium
mods.reason: Optimizes game physics, mob AI, chunk ticking, and other game logic paths.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: FerriteCore
mods.reason: Reduces memory usage by deduplicating blockstate data, baked models, and property maps.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: ImmediatelyFast
mods.reason: Batches HUD, text, and map rendering to reduce draw calls.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: Entity Culling
mods.reason: Skips rendering entities that are not visible, improving FPS in entity-heavy scenes.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: More Culling
mods.reason: Extends culling to additional block and entity cases such as signs, item frames, leaves, and clouds.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: ScalableLux
mods.reason: Optimized lighting engine that reduces lag from light updates during chunk loading and block placement.
mods.notes: Has NeoForge builds for most current 1.21.x targets; the resolver skips it where no matching file exists.

mods.name: C2ME (Concurrent Chunk Management Engine)
mods.reason: Parallelizes chunk generation, I/O, and loading on NeoForge. Restores the main chunk-loading optimization used by the Fabric profile.
mods.notes: Separate NeoForge project for C2ME. Defaults are kept conservative to preserve vanilla behavior and compatibility.

mods.name: BadOptimizations
mods.reason: Collection of small client-side optimizations such as lightmap caching, sky color caching, and renderer caching.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: ModernFix
mods.reason: Broad performance and loading optimization suite for Forge-family loaders. Covers part of the gap left by Fabric-only chunk/loading mods.
mods.notes: NeoForge analogue for several Fabric-only optimization wins, not a one-to-one C2ME replacement.

mods.name: Noisiumed
mods.reason: Optimizes noise and world generation paths. Kept as an extra NeoForge worldgen optimization alongside C2ME where supported.
mods.notes: Optional because C2ME is now the primary chunk-loading optimization. The resolver skips it on unsupported Minecraft versions.

mods.name: Smooth Boot
mods.reason: Improves startup behavior and CPU scheduling during loading. Fills the practical role of Fabric-only ThreadTweak for NeoForge builds.
mods.notes: Not a direct ThreadTweak port, but it targets the same user-facing pain point around thread pressure.

mods.name: Dynamic FPS
mods.reason: Reduces FPS and resource usage when the game is unfocused or idle.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: Fast IP Ping
mods.reason: Speeds up server list ping resolution and improves multiplayer server list loading time.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: Cloth Config API
mods.reason: Configuration library required by several cross-loader mods.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: Reese's Sodium Options
mods.reason: Improves Sodium video settings layout and usability.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: Sodium Extra
mods.reason: Adds visual and performance-related toggles around Sodium.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: Iris Shaders
mods.reason: Shader support compatible with Sodium. Disabled by default so it has no performance cost until the user enables shaders.
mods.notes: Direct NeoForge-compatible carry-over from the Fabric list.

mods.name: WI Zoom
mods.reason: Lightweight zoom feature for users who expect OptiFine-like zoom.
mods.notes: Has NeoForge builds for some 1.21.x targets; skipped automatically where unavailable.

mods.name: Default Options
mods.reason: Provides default options files for new installations. Used as the NeoForge equivalent of YOSBR for preserving pack defaults.
mods.notes: NeoForge replacement for YOSBR. Pack defaults are copied to config/defaultoptions/options.txt.

mods.name: VartaPack
mods.reason: Pack integrity and support diagnostics layer. Generates player-friendly reports and validates the expected Kernova environment.
mods.notes: Updater generates the VartaPack profile for each build so Minecraft version, loader, pack version, and mod versions stay in sync.

mods.name: PackPing
mods.reason: Client-side update notification helper for modpack releases.
mods.notes: Updater writes packping.json with the current pack version for each build.
